mapper.sql: id, template_code, display_name, provider_source, tts_model_name, description, reference_audio_url, cover_image_url, sample_script, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at

where.if: ( template_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tts_model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM app_tts_voice_template
ORDER BY enabled DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM app_tts_voice_template WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM app_tts_voice_template WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_tts_voice_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_tts_voice_template SET template_code = #{templateCode}, display_name = #{displayName}, provider_source = #{providerSource}, tts_model_name = #{ttsModelName}, description = #{description}, reference_audio_url = #{referenceAudioUrl}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, sample_script = #{sampleScript}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
